backstory.original: The imposing presence of Sergeant Knox came to Neverwinter when the Mintarn mercenaries were hired to retake the city following the eruption of Mount Hotenow. Soon he became a daily presence and mentor for new Adventurers in the city. Celeste reached out to her old friend following the catastrophic events at Elturel, hoping the veteran mercenary would join the Champions as they face the greatest foe the Sword Coast has ever seen!
backstory.display: 随着西多纳火山的喷发，明塔恩雇佣军团受雇前来重夺无冬城，而相貌堂堂的诺克斯中士也正是在此时一同来到了这里。不久后他便留了下来，甚至成为了城里新冒险者的导师。艾尔托瑞尔的灾难事件爆发后，西莱丝特向她的老朋友发出了召唤，希望这位老雇佣兵能加入勇士队，共同面对剑湾有史以来最强大的敌人！

description.original: Sgt. Knox swings his enormous Battleaxe through a random group of enemies.
description.display: 诺克斯中士挥舞着巨大的战斧穿过随机一群敌人。

longDescription.original: Sgt. Knox swings his enormous Battleaxe through a random group of enemies.
longDescription.display: 诺克斯中士挥舞着巨大的战斧穿过随机一群敌人。

description.original: Sgt. Knox performs two attacks, knocking back, stunning and damaging enemies.
description.display: 诺克斯中士进行两次攻击，击退、眩晕并伤害敌人。

longDescription.original: Sgt. Knox swings his axe in an arc, knocking nearby enemies back, damaging, and stunning them for 2 seconds. He then leaps at a random enemy and swings his axe in an overhead blow, dealing even more damage and stunning enemies in the area for 5 seconds.
longDescription.display: 诺克斯中士挥舞他的斧头，将附近的敌人击退，造成伤害，并眩晕他们 2 秒。然后他会跳向一个随机敌人，挥舞斧头造成更高伤害，并使该区域的敌人眩晕 5 秒。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in all the columns behind $source by $(amount)% for each positional formation ability affecting them, stacking multiplicatively and including this one.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $(not_buffed amount)% for every positional formation ability affecting them.

description.desc: 位于$source身后的所有勇士每受到一种位置阵型技能影响，他们的伤害即提高 $(amount)%（以乘算方式堆叠），含此技能。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target每受到一种位置阵型技能加成，使其伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%

tipText.original: Sergeant Knox buffs the champions behind him, based on the number of positional formation abilities affecting them
tipText.display: 诺克斯中士为身后的勇士提供增益，效果会根据影响他们的位置阵型技能而变化

description.desc: When $source is in the formation, Celeste and Makos become eligible for the current adventure, even if a Patron, Variant, or other restriction would say otherwise.
当$source处于阵型中时，即使赞助者、支线任务或其他限制另有规定，西莱丝特和马科斯也有资格参与当前冒险。

If they are in the formation, $source increases the effect of Celeste's Crusader's Mantle and Makos' Specialization Choice by $(not_buffed amount)% for each completed base Grand Tour adventure, stacking multiplicatively.
当他们在阵型中时，每完成一次“剑湾之旅”基础冒险，$source就会使西莱丝特“十字军传承”和马科斯“专精选择”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Sergeant Knox is at his best when paired with Celeste and Makos
tipText.display: 诺克斯中士与西莱丝特和马科斯同时在场时，可发挥最大实力

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health. If affected by Celeste's Mass Cure Wounds, $source takes 25% less damage from all attacks, excluding attacks that instantly kill him.
提升其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%被西莱丝特的群体治疗技能所影响时，$source受到的所有伤害减少 25%，此效果对能够将其秒杀的攻击无效。
The effect of Celeste's Crusader's Mantle is increased by $amount% for each unaffiliated Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: The effect of Celeste's Crusader's Mantle is increased by $amount%.

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位无从属组织阵营的勇士，西莱丝特“十字军传承”的效果即提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 西莱丝特“十字军传承”的效果提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: As Neverwinter's liaison officer, Sergeant Knox trusts Celeste's abilities to convince lone wolf heroes to work well together.
specializationDescription.display: 作为无冬城的联络官，诺克斯中士信任西莱丝特的能力，能够说服孤狼英雄们通力合作。

description.desc: Makos completes his quest to become a lich and gains the Undead tag. His damage is increased by $(amount___2)% and his critical hit damage is increased by $(amount___3)%. His base attack now targets up to 5 enemies at once, and he has a $(amount___5)% higher chance to critically hit.
马科斯完成了成为巫妖的任务，并获得了“亡灵”标签。他的伤害提高 $(amount___2)%，暴击伤害提高 $(amount___3)%。他的基本攻击现在可以同时攻击最多 5 名敌人，而且暴击几率提高了 $(amount___5)%。

specializationDescription.original: Despite Makos's dangerous ambition, Sergeant Knox relies on the tiefling's potent abilities to get things done.
specializationDescription.display: 尽管马科斯的野心十分危险，诺克斯中士仍然仰赖这位提夫林强大的能力来完成任务。

description.desc: Increases the max health of $source by $amount%. His base attack now taunts enemies he hits to target him.
使$source的最大生命值提升 $amount%。现在他的基本攻击会嘲讽被他击中的敌人，使对方将他作为目标。

specializationDescription.original: Sergeant Knox focuses on protecting his allies.
specializationDescription.display: 诺克斯中士专注于保护他的盟友。

description.desc: $source keeps track of the highest number of enemies that have been attacking him at one time and the highest number of enrage stacks there have been in the current area. The effect of Squad Leader is increased by 100% for each enemy and enrage stack, stacking additively.
$source会记录曾攻击过他的最高敌人数量，以及在当前区域内堆叠怒气的层数。每名敌人与每层怒气堆叠均使“小队长”的效果提高 100%，以加算方式堆叠。

description.original: I've been known to make a rousing speech when the moment calls for it.
description.display: 如果有需要的话，我可是以鼓舞人心的演讲而出名的。

description.original: It's a flesh wound. It just bleeds a lot.
description.display: 这是个很新鲜的伤口。它流了很多血。

description.original: Stand tall against these foes. Show them what Neverwinter stands for!
description.display: 面对敌人，一步也不要退缩。让他们看看无冬城的厉害！

description.original: It echoes over the water, causing fear to those coming into shore.
description.display: 它在水面回荡，让那些来到岸边的人感到恐惧。

description.original: If you hear it echoing down the road, you know the guard is coming.
description.display: 如果你听到路上有这首歌声在回荡，就知道守卫要来了。

description.original: If your info is correct, Celeste, we have much to fear.
description.display: 如果你的消息没错的话，西莱丝特，那我们要害怕的东西可就多了。

description.original: I'll bring the battle to you.
I've seen worse. In Neverwinter, it always gets worse.
description.display: 我见过更糟糕的情况。在无冬城，情况总是会更糟糕。

description.original: All shall be safe in Protector's Enclave!
description.display: 在保护者飞地中，所有人都是安全啊！

description.original: Many are called, but few can serve as a true leader.
description.display: 响应召唤的人很多，但真正的领袖却很少。

description.original: Rally to me! We'll show them the might of Neverwinter!
description.display: 向我靠拢！给他们看看无冬城的力量！

description.original: For every blow we sustain, we'll strike back harder!
description.display: 我们每遭受一次打击，就会用更大的力度反击！

description.original: It's all led up to this! Hit them hard, and press the advance!
description.display: 一切都是为了今天！狠揍他们，然后向前推进！

description.original: We'll carve our way through, no matter the situation.
description.display: 无论面对何种情况，我们都将奋勇向前。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Sgt. Knox's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: No matter the reason, we are here. Let's move on.
description.display: 无论理由是什么，我们都已经来到了这里。让我们继续前进吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Sgt. Knox's Specializations by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: The imposing presence of Sergeant Knox came to Neverwinter when the Mintarn mercenaries were hired to retake the city following the eruption of Mount Hotenow. Soon he became a daily presence and mentor for new Adventurers in the city. Celeste reached out to her old friend following the catastrophic events at Elturel, hoping the veteran mercenary would join the Champions as they face the greatest foe the Sword Coast has ever seen!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Sergeant Knox is a tank, that buffs all Champions behind him
